notes:
Browse rebuild — All Notes, Pinned, Folders, Tags, Archive and Trash are now one
consistent list surface (Browse Build Spec).

**New**

- **Archive and Trash now use the same list view** as All Notes — same header,
  sort and filtering. Trash shows when each note was deleted with hover **Restore**
  / **Delete forever**, plus **Empty Trash**; Archive has unarchive.
- **Pinned** has its own view with drag-to-reorder; opening a **folder** shows its
  notes with an "Inside folder" banner.

**Fixes & polish**

- Show/hide columns, a single open menu at a time (Sort / Filter / Columns),
  clearer empty states for every list, and the table scrolls sideways on a narrow
  window instead of breaking.
- Consistent spacing, hairline rows and 4px radius across all list screens.
